results.title: Scotland marks 28-year World Cup absence with 1-0 victory over Haiti in Group C
results.description: Scotland, making its first appearance in the tournament since 1998, earned its first World Cup victory since 1990, when it beat Sweden 2-1.

results.title: Netherlands vs Japan: World Cup 2026 Group F preview, squads, schedule and live streaming details
results.description: Three-time finalists the Netherlands begin their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Asia’s top-ranked side Japan in a Group F clash in Dallas. The match features contrasting histories, with both teams aiming for a strong start to their tournament journey.

results.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga Box Office collection day 3: Diljit Dosanjh's film builds momentum amid tough competition from other releases
results.description: Main Vaapas Aaunga Box Office Collection Day 3: Imtiaz Ali's historical romance starring Diljit Dosanjh and Sharvari Wagh continues its steady run at the box office. Backed by positive word-of-mouth, the Partition-era drama has collected Rs 3.16 crore net in India so far.

results.title: ‘Compromised PM Silent’: Rahul Gandhi Slams PM Modi After 3 Indian Sailors Killed Off Oman Coast
results.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi criticised the United States for its strikes on an oil ship that killed three Indian sailors and slammed PM Narendra Modi for his silence

results.title: ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026: Harmanpreet Kaur Shuts Down Handshake Question Ahead of India Women vs Pakistan Women Clash at Edgbaston
results.description: Ahead of the blockbuster India Women vs Pakistan Women clash at the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026, captain Harmanpreet Kaur firmly dismissed questions over the ongoing handshake policy, insisting her side is focused only on cricket. The Indian skipper downplayed the off-field discussion and reiterated that her team is treating the high-pressure Group A encounter like any other match in its World Cup campaign. The post ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026: Harmanpreet Kaur Shuts Down Handshake Question Ahead of India Women vs Pakistan Women Clash at Edgbaston appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: ‘Asli TMC’ Battle: Why Rebel MPs Are Meeting Speaker Om Birla And What Anti-Defection Law Says
results.description: The rebel TMC MPs left for Delhi on Sunday and are expected to hold discussions before meeting the Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla on Monday.

results.title: PM Modi’s France Visit: Trump Meeting, Bharat Innovates 2026 And G7 Summit Take Centre Stage
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi begins his visit to France with important engagements, including a meeting with Donald Trump and the launch of Bharat Innovates 2026. The visit included significant talks between French President Emmanuel Macron and him about the G7 Summit.

results.title: Weekly Love Horoscope Predictions, June 14 to June 20, 2026: Your zodiac love forecast for this week
results.description: This week, love emphasizes attention and genuine connection over grand gestures. Whether committed or single, focus on authentic interactions and quiet appreciation. Relationships flourish through shared moments, emotional maturity, and allowing bonds to develop naturally, rather than forcing them.

results.title: Man found with stab wounds near Shakarpur flyover in east Delhi, probe under way
results.description: A 26-year-old man was found with multiple stab injuries near a flyover in east Delhi’s Shakarpur area on Sunday, police said. The injured man, identified as Mohit Tiwari, a resident of Ganesh Nagar, was initially admitted to a private hospital before being shifted to the Lok Nayak Jai Prakash Narayan (LNJP) Hospital, they said. results.title: Ancelotti calls for improvement after Brazil’s 1-1 draw with Morocco
results.description: Brazil's head coach Carlo Ancelotti calls for improvement after a 1-1 draw with Morocco in their FIFA World Cup Group C opener on June 14.

results.title: Indian-origin player makes FIFA World Cup debut as Australia stun Turkiye in Vancouver
results.description: Nishan Velupillay, an Australian footballer of Indian heritage, stepped onto the field for his FIFA World Cup debut on Sunday, June 14, 2026. It happened as Australia opened their Group D campaign with a 2-0 victory over Turkiye. He entered the contest from the bench in the 61st minute and spent the closing stages helping his side secure a disciplined defensive shape against persistent pressure.

results.title: Bhagwant Mann govt to take devotees on free teerath yatra to Salasar Balaji Dham, Sri Khatu Shyam Ji, Haridwar-Rishikesh and Shri Mathura Ji-Vrindavan Dham: Arvind Kejriwal
results.description: Addressing a gathering in the presence of CM Bhagwant Singh Mann, Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) National Convenor Arvind Kejriwal said the Punjab Government is not only enabling devotees to undertake sacred pilgrimages free of cost but is also investing in the restoration and development of revered religious sites. The post Bhagwant Mann govt to take devotees on free teerath yatra to Salasar Balaji Dham, Sri Khatu Shyam Ji, Haridwar-Rishikesh and Shri Mathura Ji-Vrindavan Dham: Arvind Kejriwal appeared first on News24 .
